title: Late Afternoon of the Living Dead
original_title: Late Afternoon of the Living Dead
overview: A librarian named Chris awakens in an abandoned attic. When attacked by a pack of hungry zombies, he completes the transformation from mild-mannered husband and Dewey Decimal System guru to zombie slaying machine.
